# Atoms - from Atomic Habits · Habit Tracker

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)

## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 6, 2026 - Feb 6, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Royal Montgomery_, Feb 6, 2026, 4/5: "i like this app but it has issues and i can't really submit bug reports - the app team wants bug reports to be submitted via the app so they can check, but it would require me to get the gmail app which i do not want. i would change to another email because i do have outlook but...i can't change my email address in the app. for example, today i got a notification that i could save my streak for something i definitely checked off yesterday. not a huge deal but kind of annoying. it is VERY helpful overall but if they could let us change our email or have bug reports that do not require an email app to open it would be five stars."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      4 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Mar 16, 2026 - Jul 14, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Fjgfnjh_, Jul 14, 2026, 2/5: "I read the book and it helped a lot. I had heard that the author put the book everywhere to help the most people and that was very welcoming to hear. Being suddenly locked out and charged is NOT the principles the book taught, it is greedy scummy practices. I didn’t even make any account it just lied about the free capabilities until I’d been invested for a month. Growing as a person shouldn’t be a subscription. Shameful, I look at the book Atomic habits differently now and that’s such a huge let down."
            2. _Toadanator92_, Jun 2, 2026, 2/5: "I love what the app promises and the design of it but the in application subscription is overpriced and both the free and paid tiers just don’t deliver enough."
            3. _imnotchris_, Jun 15, 2026, 5/5: "I’ve tried a lot of ‘motivation’ apps but honestly most of them had a paywall. This app keeps its simple, but effective at the same time"
